title: Kottravai Creates Opportunities for Women Entrepreneurs
excerpt: Empowering rural artisans through sustainable livelihood initiatives. We bridge the gap between traditional craftsmanship and modern markets, ensuring every creator gets their due.
content:
Empowering rural artisans through sustainable livelihood initiatives. We bridge the gap between traditional craftsmanship and modern markets, ensuring every creator gets their due.

Our vision is to build a platform where women entrepreneurs can thrive independently.
author: Kottravai Team

title: Kottravai Women's Skill Development Training Initiative Launched by Mr. Sridhar Vembu
excerpt: A deep dive into our new skill development training initiative aimed at transforming lives.
content:
We are thrilled to announce the launch of our Women's Skill Development Training Initiative, officially inaugurated by Mr. Sridhar Vembu.

This initiative will provide hands-on training to hundreds of women, equipping them with the craftsmanship skills needed to create premium sustainable products.
author: Kottravai Team

title: Kottravai Achievements in Kungumam Thozi Reports by Mrs. Ramya Ranganathan
excerpt: Celebrating our recent features and recognitions in empowering women artisans.
content:
Our efforts in transforming the lives of rural women artisans have been prominently featured in the Kungumam Thozi Reports, thanks to the wonderful coverage by Mrs. Ramya Ranganathan.

This recognition fuels our mission to reach even more artisans across the country.
author: Kottravai Team

title: Strengthening Women's Employment Opportunities to Recognize Their Handcrafted Works
excerpt: How we are creating sustainable employment opportunities for women across the region.
content:
True empowerment begins with financial independence. At Kottravai, we are dedicated to strengthening employment opportunities for women by giving their handcrafted works a global stage.

By removing the middlemen, our artisans earn what they truly deserve.
author: Kottravai Team

title: Transforming Beedi-Working Women into Skilled Craft Professionals
excerpt: The journey of transformation from hazardous labor to skilled craftsmanship.
content:
One of our most impactful missions has been helping women transition out of hazardous beedi-rolling work into safe, respected, and highly skilled craft professions.

Their incredible talent is now being showcased through beautiful eco-friendly products.
author: Kottravai Team
